entity_data.publication_caption: Ontem, o Balneário Shopping recebeu o Icônico Pedro Mafra e suas convidadas para um evento especial em celebração à nova coleção Origens da Paula Torres, uma marca de sapatos exclusivos e feitos à mão. O encontro começou com um almoço impecável no restaurante italiano Duladu, seguido de um coquetel na loja, onde as convidadas puderam conhecer de perto cada detalhe da coleção ao lado da própria fundadora, Ana Paula Torres. Para tornar o momento ainda mais memorável, as convidadas foram presenteadas com as pulseiras exclusivas da marca e personalizadas com as suas iniciais A Paula Torres está no piso L1 do Balneário Shopping. Venha descobrir a coleção Origens e viver essa experiência única. ✨💫

Quinta-feira pede um Happy Hour à altura! 🍹🎶 Vem curtir uma noite especial com música ao vivo, double drink nos restaurantes participantes e aquela vibe perfeita para relaxar e aproveitar. ✨ 📍 Onde? Piso L1, pertinho do Unizushi e Duladu. 🕕 Quando? Quinta-feira, a partir das 19h! Chama a galera, marca na agenda e vem brindar com a gente! 🍸🎤  Para mais informações, consulte os restaurantes. @unizushisc é @duladududu

Clima de sabores no ar!  Começou o Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping com opções incríveis para todos os gostos e com valor fixo de R$70,00.  Aproveite até 30 de abril nos restaurantes participantes: Unizushi, Madero, Outback, Las Lenas e Pecorino. Venha viver essa experiência deliciosa! *Confira os pratos disponíveis nos restaurantes participantes. *Válido para almoço e jantar.

Uma experiência italiana cheia de sabor e diversão! 🍕✨  No Duladu, a cozinha italiana ganha um toque moderno e descontraído, perfeita para quem ama boa comida e momentos especiais.  Que tal conhecer e se deliciar? 💛 📍 Duladu – Piso L1

A LOBA VEM AÍ! 🗣 Shakira acaba de anunciar que vai trazer a turnê “The Las Mujeres Ya No Lloran World Tour” para o Brasil! 😱 A cantora estará no Rio de Janeiro no dia 11 de fevereiro, e em São Paulo no dia 13 de fevereiro (passa pro lado)! E vale avisar: a pré-venda acontece entre os dias 09  e 10 de outubro, já a venda geral vai rolar a partir do dia 11/10. #shakira #LMYNLWorldTour #radiomix #radiomixfm

ELE CHEGOU! 🇧🇷 Após 6 anos, Niall Horan já está em solo brasileiro. O cantor se apresenta em São Paulo e Rio de Janeiro com a "The Show: Live on Tour". A Mix é Rádio Oficial e você acompanha toda cobertura em nossas redes sociais. (📷 @gi_fflorencio) #niallhoran #liveontour

Já que hoje é dia de #TBT, bora relembrar um pouquinho de tudo o que rolou no Rock in Rio 40 Anos? Já estamos com saudades! 🥹🫶 E aí, qual foi o seu momento favorito da edição de 2024? Conta pra gente aqui nos comentários! Oferecimento: @cocacola_br @engov_oficial @ifoodbrasil @movidaalugueldecarros @superbet_br
O Rock in Rio foi pura nostalgia 🥹❤ Qual desses hits você mais gostava de ouvir na programação da Mix? #tbt #mariahcarey #neyo #akon #evanescence #rockinrio #rockinrio2024 #rockinrio40anos

"Passarinho! Que som é esse?" 🤔 É o som que a Katy Perry ouviu enquanto se apresentava no Rock in Rio! 🤯 Kristopher Pooley, engenheiro de som da Katy Perry, isolou os vocais das 100 mil pessoas que assistiram nossa diva direto da Cidade do Rock! Dá só uma olhada nessa galera cantando o hit "California Gurls"! 😱 Quem tava aí no meio? 👀 📷: Renan Areias / Kristopher Pooley #katyperry #radiomix #radiomixfm #rockinrio #rockinrio2024 #rockinrio40anos
Shawn Mendes entregando TUDO no Palco Mundo do Rock in Rio 🤩 (🎥 @cacograndino) #RockinRio2024 #RockinRioNaMix #Festival #RockinRio40anos #ShawnMendes #ShawnMendesNoRockinRio

entity_data.img_caption:
The image shows a close-up of two hands holding a small, intricately designed object. The object appears to be a keychain or a similar accessory with a leather strap and gold-colored metal hardware. The keychain features three triangular metal pieces attached to the leather strap, each with a pointed end. The hands are gently holding the keychain, with one hand gripping the leather strap and the other hand supporting the metal components.

The background is blurred, but it seems to be an indoor setting with a patterned surface, possibly a tablecloth or a carpet. The lighting in the image gives a warm, golden hue, highlighting the details of the keychain and the hands holding it. The person's nails are painted in a bright red color, adding a pop of color to the scene. The overall composition of the image focuses on the craftsmanship and design of the keychain.

The image shows a woman standing in front of a mirror, smiling and looking at herself. She is wearing a strapless white dress that fits closely to her body, accentuating her figure. The dress has a smooth, polished texture and appears to be made of a lightweight fabric. She is also wearing a delicate necklace with small, round beads or stones. Her hair is long and dark, and she has a subtle makeup look, including a light blush and eyeliner.

In the background, there are other women who appear to be in a dressing room or a boutique. One woman on the left is wearing a white dress with thin straps and has her hair pulled back. Another woman on the right is wearing a patterned top and blue pants. The setting suggests a fashion-related environment, possibly a high-end boutique or a fashion event. The lighting in the room is warm and inviting, creating a pleasant atmosphere.

entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts a meal setting on a wooden table. The main focus is a long, thin slice of bread topped with various ingredients. The bread appears to be toasted and has a golden-brown crust. On top of the bread, there are slices of red tomatoes, green basil leaves, and a green sauce that looks like pesto or a similar herb-based spread. The bread is placed on a piece of paper that reads "PARLACOMANDO" in large, bold letters, suggesting it might be a menu or promotional material for a restaurant.

To the left of the bread, there is a plate with a salad. The salad consists of mixed greens, possibly including arugula or spinach, and some figs. The figs are sliced and appear to be fresh, adding a sweet element to the salad.

In the background, there is a small vase with yellow flowers, adding a touch of color and freshness to the scene. The overall presentation suggests a casual yet thoughtful meal setup, combining fresh ingredients and a rustic touch.

entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts a lively scene inside a restaurant or café. The main focus is on a woman with long, blonde hair wearing a white sleeveless top and high-waisted jeans. She has her hand in her pocket and is looking to the side, possibly engaged in conversation or observing something outside the frame.

In the background, there are several other people seated at tables, enjoying their meals and drinks. The tables are set with plates, glasses, and cutlery, indicating that they are dining. The ambiance of the place is warm and inviting, with soft lighting and decorative elements such as potted plants and hanging lights adding to the cozy atmosphere.

The setting appears to be casual and relaxed, suggesting a social gathering or a friendly meet-up among friends. The overall mood of the image is cheerful and convivial.

The image depicts a close-up view of a dining table setting, likely in a restaurant or a well-decorated home dining area. The table is adorned with various items that suggest a sophisticated and elegant dining experience.

1. **Glassware**: A hand is holding a tall, clear glass filled with a light-colored beverage, possibly champagne or sparkling wine. The glass is positioned on the left side of the image.

2. **Napkins**: There are neatly folded white napkins placed on the table. One napkin is directly in front of the glass, while another is slightly to the right.

3. **Beverage Bottle**: To the right of the glass, there is a white bottle with a wooden cap. The label on the bottle reads "PUDU," which could be the brand name or type of beverage.

4. **Silver Bucket**: Next to the bottle, there is a metallic bucket containing additional napkins or perhaps a small serving dish.

5. **Placemat**: The table is covered with a woven placemat, adding a rustic touch to the setting.

6. **Flowers**: On the left side of the image, there is a small vase with red flowers, adding a pop of color to the scene.

7. **Background**: The background features a red-tiled wall, which contrasts nicely with the green cushion or chair visible behind the hand holding the glass.

8. **Table Setting**: The overall arrangement suggests a formal or semi-formal dining setting, possibly for a special occasion or a fine dining experience.

The image conveys a sense of elegance and attention to detail, with each item carefully placed to create a harmonious and inviting atmosphere.

The image shows a group of six women standing together in what appears to be a stylish, modern interior space. The background features wooden paneling and a chandelier with multiple light bulbs, creating a warm and elegant atmosphere. 

Starting from the left:

The sandals have a strap that goes over the top of the foot and is secured with a gold buckle. The person's nails are painted red, and they are wearing a ring on their ring finger. The background features a green dress adorned with numerous small, gold-colored sequins arranged in a circular pattern around the neckline. The dress also has a gold belt with a similar design to the sandals' strap. The overall style of the outfit suggests a fashion-forward and elegant look.
